unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No Rules, No Order
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: “入”(ru)门须懂rule(规则)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n.秩序;命令 v.点菜;命令
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No Rules, No Order
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: or(或者) der(得)，必须遵守秩序否则得受罚。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Students like us follow rules!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: 佛罗(fol-low)里达州的人喜欢跟随潮流。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't be late for school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语联想: late(晚) + for(为了) = 为了某事晚了，即迟到。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Arrive on time.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆法: ar(阿) rive(河)，到达(arrive)河边。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: on time vs in time (及时)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Arrive on time.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面联想: 踩在(on)那个时间点(time)上，即准时。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't run in the hallways.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法: hall(大厅) + way(路) = 走廊。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wear the school uniform.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法: uni(统一) + form(形式) = 统一形式的衣服(制服)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't litter. Keep your school clean and tidy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 立刻(lit)特(ter)别脏，因为有人乱扔垃圾。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Be polite and treat everyone with respect.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 破(po)烂特(lite)别有礼貌的人不会穿。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. 对待;招待;治疗 n. 款待
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Be polite and treat everyone with respect.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 踹它(treat)，这可不是对待动物的好方式。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Be polite and treat everyone with respect.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法: re(一再) + spect(看) = 一再看某人，表示尊敬。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Put up your hand if you want to ask your teacher a question.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 衣服(if)如果破了就缝一下。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sally mustn't wear her own jacket at school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 杰克(Jack)特(et)别喜欢穿夹克衫。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She has to wear the uniform.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组联想: have(有) + to(去做) = 有责任去做，不得不。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Is everything OK?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 复合词: every(每) + thing(事情) = 每件事。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Here, I can lend you my pen.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 懒的(lend)人总是借东西。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Would you like a sweet?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 斯威特(sweet)，吃起来甜甜的糖果。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We can't eat snacks in class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 蛇(snake)吃死耐克(snack)小吃会噎着。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yes, of course.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组联想: course原意过程/路线，沿着理所当然的路线即为“当然”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Oh, but we can't / mustn't bring our mobile phones to class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法: mob(动) + ile(形容词后缀) = 可移动的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Oh, but we can't / mustn't bring our mobile phones to class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 复合联想: 可移动的(mobile)电话(phone) = 手机。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We have to turn them off and put/keep them in our lockers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作联想: 扭转(turn)使其离开(off)工作状态=关掉。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't jump the queue.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 字母Q的发音，排队的人形就像一个Q。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: jump the queue vs line up
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't jump the queue.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面联想: 跳过(jump)队伍(queue) = 插队。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can feed my dog many kinds of food, but I can't give him chocolate.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 飞的(feed)鸟需要喂养。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can I leave the classroom if I don't feel well?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 礼物(leave)留下了，人离开了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: you have to tell your teacher about it when you are absent from class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法: ab(离开) + sent(送) = 送走了就不在场，即缺席的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: you have to tell your teacher about it when you are absent from class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组联想: 从(from)某个地方缺席(absent)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: interj. 嘘(用以让别人安静下来)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Shh, we must talk quietly in the library.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 象声词记忆: 发出“嘘”的声音让人安静。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Shh, we must talk quietly in the library.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆法: quiet(安静的) + ly(副词后缀) = 安静地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you put on your seat belt?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 抱他(belt)得先解开安全带。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We mustn't make noise.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 弄死(noise)那些故意制造噪音的人。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Why is Alice unhappy?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 前缀记忆法: un(不) + happy(快乐) = 不快乐。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Dear Dr Know,
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 缩写记忆: doctor去中间留头尾即Dr。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: make the bed vs go to bed
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Every morning, I have to make my bed before breakfast.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 场景联想: 制造(make)一个舒适的床(bed) = 铺床。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I mustn't use my phone in class either.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 挨着(either)他也不行 (用于否定)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can only play basketball after I practise the piano.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 扑克提示(practise)需要反复练习。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't hang out with my friends on weekdays.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 航(hang)行时衣服悬挂在桅杆上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't hang out with my friends on weekdays.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作联想: 挂(hang)在外面(out)无所事事 = 闲逛。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n.工作日 (星期一至星期五的任何一天)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't hang out with my friends on weekdays.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 复合词: week(周) + day(天) = 一周中上班的日子(工作日)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I know some rules are important, but this is awful!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 嗷夫(awful)，发出好糟糕的叫声。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But they can help you to become a better person.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 复合词联想: be(存在) + come(来) = 到来成为某种状态。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 较好的 adv. 较好地
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But they can help you to become a better person.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 规则记忆: good的比较级，比good好(better)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But they can help you to become a better person.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 破损(person)的是一个假人。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v.集中(注意力、精力等);聚焦
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can't use your phone in class because you need to focus on learning.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 否克死(focus)，集中精力学习就不会挂科。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can't use your phone in class because you need to focus on learning.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 搭配记忆法: 把聚焦点放到(on)某事上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You have to wear a uniform because it builds school spirit.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 彪的(build)工人喜欢快速建造东西。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You have to wear a uniform because it builds school spirit.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 死拼(spirit)到底的体育精神。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can also think about the things you can do!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组联想: 脑海里想(think)关于(about)某件事 = 思考。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You can relax after you finish your homework.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法: re(再) + lax(松弛) = 使紧绷的神经再次松弛(放松)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What is your advice for each rule?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法: 爱得维斯(advice)，他给的建议非常忠诚。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: understand rules help me to become a better person
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 复合词联想: under(在下面) + stand(站) = 站在下面认真听讲才能理解。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I mustn't let my desk get untidy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 前缀记忆法: un(不) + tidy(整洁的) = 不整洁的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Mary can't run in the hallway.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 音译人名记忆。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Tony can't litter.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 音译人名记忆。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hi, I'm Anne. What's your name?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 音译人名记忆。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Dear Eric,
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 音译人名记忆。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: get along well vs get along with
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In our class, we must get along well with others.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 情境联想: get(得到) + along(顺着) + well(好) = 大家顺着好脾气相处(相处融洽)。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: take care of vs care for
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: take care of the classroom
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组联想: 拿出(take)关心(care)给(of)某人某物 = 照顾。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: And you can hang out with friends at weekends!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 搭配记忆法: 在周末通常用介词at或on。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Mary, slow down! Don't run in the hallway, please.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面联想: slow(慢) + down(下来) = 慢下来。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Make sure to keep the school tidy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组联想: 制造(make)一种确定的(sure)状态 = 确保。
